name: Best Ever Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the beef bone in enough water to cover, plus 2 additional quarts until the meat falls off of the bone.
2. Add the rice and boil for 15 minutes, then add the vegetables and continue boiling until they are tender but not mushy—about 20 minutes.
3. Cut the meat into bite-sized pieces, keeping it hot in the soup.
4. Add the parsley and serve.
